case_title: MCGUIRE, JOHN J. VS COWLING, KENAN D. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGUIRE, JOHN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COWLING, KENAN D. $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $70.00, JUDGMENT BASED ON VALUE OF LEATHER COAT, OVERCOAT AND ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY MCGUIRE, JOHN J. AS TO DEFENDANT COWLING, KENAN D. CRAIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CERTIFIED MAIL TO KENAN COWLING RETURNED SIGNED.
